should_trigger.input: Check if this SKILL.md's name, description, and body are internally consistent
should_trigger.reason: Directly requests operational rule audit — the primary use case

should_trigger.input: Audit the approval boundaries across our AGENTS.md and skill files
should_trigger.reason: Requests boundary/approval consistency audit — core responsibility
